chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Application No.S-69 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.02.2025 Applicant is present in person Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant P.G Sindh a/w SHO of P.S Sakrand Asghar Ali Awan, Inspector Manzoor Ali and ASI Ghulam Rasool of P.S Baldia Respondent No.9 is present in person *** Through this application, applicant has sought directions for official respondents to recover her wife i.e alleged detainee Mst. Zindo and produce her before this Court. Today private respondent No.9 as well as official respondents effected appearance and file their respective comments/reports, which are taken on record. Alongwith the reports/comments photocopy of statement of alleged detainee Mst. Zino recorded under Section 164 Cr.P.C before Area Magistrate P.S Pir Wadhae Rawalpindi is annexed, wherein she has specifically stated that she has filed a case for khula and does not want to live with her husband (applicant), instead she wants to live with her father/respondent No.9. From the perusal of statement of alleged detainee, referred to above, it is clear that she is not in any wrongful confinement, as alleged in present application and being sue juris she is entitled to pass her life according to her own wish. Therefore, present Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed being not maintainable; however, the applicant is at liberty to approach the Court of competent jurisdiction for redressal of his grievance, if any, in accordance with law. JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
